description_line1: EduPlan helps you manage your student projects simply and effectively.
description_line2: Plan, track and succeed in your team work, from start to delivery.
presentation_text: EduPlan is a project management platform designed for students. It allows you to create projects, assign tasks, track progress and collaborate with your team. Simple, intuitive and effective.
footer_credit: Designed by NGLITANG Ruben - ENSPD - Dynamic Web Programming Project
